title: Creative Project Manager Johannesburg
excerpt: We are looking for a new studio operations manager/project manager in our Johannesburg based brand architecture consulting firm. Ideal candidate with Monday.com experience digital project management and bookkeeping skill…

posts.author: Eben (Eben)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are looking for a new studio operations manager/project manager in our Johannesburg based brand architecture consulting firm. Ideal candidate with Monday.com experience digital project management and bookkeeping skills.
Please mail resume and cover letter to talent@breinstorm.co.za
